title: npm Package Document
description: A full npm package document (packument) representing all metadata for a package in the npm registry, including every published version, distribution tags, maintainers, and repository information.

_id.description: The package name, used as the CouchDB document identifier.

name.description: The name of the package. Must follow npm naming rules: lowercase, no spaces, may contain hyphens and dots.

description.description: A short description of the package, used in search results.

dist-tags.description: A mapping of distribution tag names to version strings. The 'latest' tag is always present and points to the most recently published non-prerelease version.

latest.description: The latest stable version of the package.

versions.description: A mapping of semver version strings to version-specific metadata objects.

time.description: A mapping of version strings to ISO 8601 timestamps indicating when each version was published. Includes special keys 'created' and 'modified'.

created.description: When the package was first created in the registry.

modified.description: When the package was last modified.

maintainers.description: List of current package maintainers with publish access.

readme.description: The README content for the package, typically from the latest version.

readmeFilename.description: The filename of the README file.

homepage.description: The URL of the package homepage.

keywords.description: Keywords associated with the package for search discovery.

bugs.description: Issue tracker information for reporting bugs.

license.description: The SPDX license identifier for the package.

users.description: A mapping of npm usernames to boolean values indicating users who have starred this package.

PackageVersion.description: Metadata for a specific published version of a package.

description.description: A short description of the package.

main.description: The entry point module for the package.

types.description: The TypeScript type declarations entry point.

exports.description: Package exports map for conditional module resolution.

scripts.description: A mapping of script names to shell commands.

dependencies.description: Runtime dependencies as a mapping of package names to semver ranges.

devDependencies.description: Development dependencies as a mapping of package names to semver ranges.

peerDependencies.description: Peer dependencies as a mapping of package names to semver ranges.

optionalDependencies.description: Optional dependencies as a mapping of package names to semver ranges.

engines.description: Runtime environment requirements as a mapping of engine names to semver ranges.

bin.description: Executable files to install into PATH.

maintainers.description: List of maintainers for this version.

deprecated.description: Deprecation message if this version is deprecated.

_npmVersion.description: The version of npm used to publish this package version.

_nodeVersion.description: The version of Node.js used to publish this package version.

_hasShrinkwrap.description: Whether this version includes a shrinkwrap file.

Person.description: A person object representing a user, author, maintainer, or contributor.

name.description: The display name of the person.

email.description: The email address of the person.

url.description: The personal URL or website of the person.

type.description: The version control system type, typically 'git'.

url.description: The URL of the source code repository.

directory.description: The directory within the repository where the package lives, for monorepos.

Distribution.description: Distribution metadata for a published version, including integrity hashes and tarball location.

shasum.description: The SHA-1 checksum of the tarball.

tarball.description: The URL where the tarball can be downloaded.

integrity.description: The Subresource Integrity (SRI) hash of the tarball, typically using SHA-512.

fileCount.description: The number of files in the tarball.

unpackedSize.description: The total unpacked size of the tarball in bytes.

npm-signature.description: The npm registry signature for the package version.

signatures.description: Cryptographic signatures for the package version.

keyid.description: The identifier of the signing key.

attestations.description: Sigstore provenance attestations for the package version.

url.description: URL to fetch the full attestation bundle.
